title: Pure Core, UI Adapters, Dependency Direction, and Snapshots · Behavior Case: Domain Core
summary: Cells call Canvas methods, algorithms read widgets, tests require a display, and mutable state leaks across attempts. Predict the model, event, graph, solver, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the domain core increment in pure maze core with Tk adapter ports. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep topology, generation, search, state transitions, and evidence free of Tk widget and operating-system dependencies.
Cover every allowed and rejected edge, repeated command, cancellation race, failure, and close transition.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

Build deterministic Python evidence to enforce a pure domain core, narrow UI ports, immutable snapshots, and testable dependency direction; native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution; then change display scale and retain focus and control access. content.code:
# Evidence: maze-worked-maze-architecture-pure-core-5
# Competency: maze-worked-maze-architecture-pure-core-5.
# Case 9036: a low-vision player session.
# Operating constraint: the prior good state must survive failure.
# Changed case: switch the solver or generator and restate each guarantee.
def worked_maze_architecture_pure_core_5(domain_modules: int = 7, ui_imports_in_core: int = 0, adapter_ports: int = 6, fake_adapter_cases: int = 18, snapshot_mutations: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "gridworked5",
        "topology9036",
        "search5dekrow",
        "eventworked59036",
        "access9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if domain_modules < 1 or adapter_ports < 4:
        return False, adapter_ports, "architecture-shape"
    if ui_imports_in_core > 0:
        return False, ui_imports_in_core, "dependency-inversion"
    if fake_adapter_cases < 8:
        return False, fake_adapter_cases, "adapter-evidence"
    if snapshot_mutations > 0:
        return False, snapshot_mutations, "snapshot-isolation"
    assert ui_imports_in_core == 0 and snapshot_mutations == 0
    return True, fake_adapter_cases, "pure-core-boundary"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic pure-Python maze decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected grid, topology, frontier, path, callback, state, accessibility, save, package, or recovery case, then state which Tcl, Tk, tkinter, Canvas, display, focus, input, assistive-technology, filesystem, timing, installer, or production claim still needs controlled native transfer evidence.

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Domain Core model · Theory Domain Core, keep Domain Core connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Keep topology, generation, search, state transitions, and evidence free of Tk widget and operating-system dependencies.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Domain Core model · Theory Domain Core, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Domain Core precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Domain Core model · Theory Domain Core, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A theory puzzle team handles case 5324 during a clean desktop release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to enforce a pure domain core, narrow UI ports, immutable snapshots, and testable dependency direction; the prior good state must survive failure; then change display scale and retain focus and control access. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep topology, generation, search, state transitions, and evidence free of Tk widget and operating-system dependencies.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Domain Core model · Theory Domain Core, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: A GUI project cannot have a pure domain model.
